---
title: "01_Homework"
author: "Bill Perry"
---

# Assignment Overview

This homework assignment focuses on 

## Learning Objectives

By completing this assignment, you will be able to:

1.  **asdfasdf**
2.  **adsfafdsa**

## Data Description


## Goals to accomplish
1. 324543
2. 45345
3. 4534
-----------------------------------------------------------------------



::: callout-note
## Important Background

Stuff to know
:::
